main.description: Genesis record: quintessence crystallized into Tass at a Node. Captures the initial energy endowment of a tass object at the moment of its formation. Forms the anchor that enervate records drain against.

node.description: AT-URI of the Node where this tass formed (e.g. at://did:plc:.../com.superbfowle.tass.node/rkey)

quintessence.description: Initial quintessence value crystallized into this tass

form.description: Coincidental form the tass takes in reality (e.g. 'a silver coin', 'a vial of ink')

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this tass was crystallized
